ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package's functionality */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is released */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the package */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import entry */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package that imports another */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package being imported */,
  "import_method" TEXT /* Method of import (e.g., direct, wildcard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the import method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the import method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package entry */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package that requires another */,
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the required package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the required package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_required_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for heaviness metrics */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being measured */,
  "parent_heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score indicating the package's impact on its parent */,
  "child_heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score indicating the package's impact on its children */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heaviness metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heaviness metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency analysis */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being analyzed */,
  "analysis_report" TEXT /* Generated report detailing the package's dependencies */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_analysis_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_categories" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the linking entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the linking entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the linking entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_categories_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import class entry */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding import */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class being imported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_classes_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_packages" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the linking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the linking entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the linking entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_packages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the package */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the download was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the download was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_downloads_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import metric entry */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import being measured */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the import is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_metrics_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reviews_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
